title: Independent Women
why_this_song: Independent Women by Destiny's Child (2000) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 26 times; first heard in: "All my independent women, throw them hands up at me"
Appears 23 times; first heard in: "All my independent women, throw them hands up at me"
Appears 23 times; first heard in: "All my independent women, throw them hands up at me"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "If you feel it throw them hands up"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Buy my own car and spend my own money"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Where the ladies? Where my home girls?
Where my females? Where all my women?
How you feel about a girl like this?
Try to control me, boy, you'll get dismissed
Where the ladies? Where my home girls?
Where my females? Where all my women?
How did you feel about this groove I wrote?
Hope you got the message, ladies take control

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hands" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hands" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "women" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "women" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: What you think about a girl like me?
How you feel about a girl like this?
Hope you got the message, ladies take control

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Only ring your celly when I'm feeling lonely
If you feel it throw them hands up
If you ain't in love, I congratulate you

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Independent Women", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Independent Women", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Independent Women" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Independent Women" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Independent Women" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Independent Women", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
